PPS_PRCR_VRSN _CD 

LABEL: Prospective Payment System (PPS) Pricer Version 

DESCRIPTION: This variable displays the prospective payment system (PPS) pricer version. 

SHORT NAME: PPS_PRCR_VRSN_CD 

LONG NAME: PPS_PRCR_VRSN_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 10 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field was new in 2021.
